rationale: The citing paper is about diagnosing MVN heterogeneity in hierarchical Bayes models and explicitly positions itself against more flexible heterogeneity alternatives; the cited paper’s core contribution is a Bayesian Dirichlet-process heterogeneity framework in a marketing demand model. That makes the citation plausibly methodological/foundational (not clearly incidental), so it should be retained for full relation judgment despite limited raw reference context (DOI-only match).
